title: Bridge Essay: Variation in Divergent Thinking, Executive-Control Abilities, and Mind-Wandering Measured In and Out of the Laboratory.
concept: Spontaneous thought — mind-wandering, DMN, creative insight, involuntary cognition.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Non-fabrication** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Non-fabrication — spontaneous thought, mind-wandering, DMN, creative insight.
**Phase context:** Spontaneous thought — mind-wandering, DMN, creative insight, involuntary cognition.

**Variation in Divergent Thinking, Executive-Control Abilities, and Mind-Wandering Measured In and Out of the Laboratory.** — Creat Res J (2024). DOI: 10.1080/10400419.2024.2326336. PMID: 41019193. Individual differences in executive functions (or executive control abilities) predict variation in creative thinking ability. Relatedly, propensity for mind-wandering-or task unrelated thought-has been gaining attention among creativity scholars, but its effects on creativity remain unclear.
